sql_array: CREATE TABLE ser_udt_table (id INT, instance SER_UDT);
INSERT INTO ser_udt_table (id, instance) VALUES (1, new SER_UDT()), (2, new SER_UDT());
SELECT id, udt_get(instance, 'A') <> udt_get(instance, 'B') AS comparison_result FROM ser_udt_table WHERE udt_get(instance, 'A') IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, instance FROM ser_udt_table WHERE (udt_get(instance, 'A') <> 'sample_value' OR udt_get(instance, 'B') <> NULL);
WITH subquery AS (SELECT id, udt_get(instance, 'A') AS member_a FROM ser_udt_table) SELECT subquery.id FROM subquery WHERE member_a <> (SELECT udt_get(instance, 'B') FROM ser_udt_table WHERE id = 1);
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, udt_get(instance, 'A') AS a_member FROM ser_udt_table WHERE udt_get(instance, 'A') IS NOT NULL GROUP BY id, a_member HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT a.id, COUNT(*) FROM temp_table AS a JOIN ser_udt_table AS b ON a.a_member <> udt_get(b.instance, 'C') GROUP BY a.id HAVING COUNT(*) < 5;
SELECT DISTINCT udt_get(instance, 'D') AS member_d FROM ser_udt_table WHERE udt_get(instance, 'E') IS NULL OR udt_get(instance, 'D') <> '';
INSERT INTO ser_udt_table (id, instance) VALUES (3, new SER_UDT());
SELECT a.id FROM ser_udt_table a INNER JOIN ser_udt_table b ON udt_get(a.instance, 'F') <> udt_get(b.instance, 'G') WHERE id < 10;
